cells.rationale: Well-specified new leaf module, but the shared launch-config return type and compile-time-total floor map ripple into every downstream consumer, making it contract-touching and warranting the xhigh band on the default sonnet workhorse.

Cross-cutting multi-file cascade rerouting every dispatch site (daemon, autopilot, reconcile-core, handoff, cli) with a subtle byte-identical-argv correctness invariant and fn-1240 merge adjacency, a nameable intelligence-bound reason for opus.
Bounded extension of existing triple-harvest and presets-list output surfaces against a landed v2 pattern, template-following with a fully-specified acceptance.

Mechanical symmetric parser-field addition across two islands with schema validation and a verbatim example block, bounded and named, but the lockstep parity coordination keeps it on sonnet rather than the trickle lane.
Multi-file template conversion following the existing practice-scout/workers render pattern with byte-verbatim bodies and golden re-capture, a known-pattern feature spanning a few files.
A fully-enumerated host-blind partition drift gate plus forward-facing docs prose sweep, bounded work with a do-exactly-this acceptance and named failure cases.
